events.title: AFRIVORA — First Edition
events.time: Red Carpet 3:00 PM · Main Event 5:00 PM
events.venue: YWCA Hall, after vegetable market, Airport Road, Benin City
events.description: AFRIVORA brings together a stage play, a cultural festival, and a trade fair. The inaugural edition features NEKIGHIDI, a stage play written by Ossa Earliece and performed partly in Edo.
